metadata.title: Belgium Contractor Management Services | Jackson & Frank
metadata.description: Belgium contractor management and compliant contractor onboarding. Engage freelancers in Belgium without entity. Belgian contractor classification, ONSS/RSZ, contracts. Fast onboarding.

faqs.title: Belgium Contractor FAQs
faqs.subtitle: Common questions about contractor management in Belgium.

items.question: What is the risk of misclassifying contractors in Belgium?
items.answer: Belgian authorities can reclassify contractors as employees, leading to back ONSS/RSZ contributions, taxes, and penalties. Using compliant contracts and proper classification assessment reduces this risk.

items.question: How fast can I onboard a contractor in Belgium?
items.answer: With Jackson & Frank, contractor onboarding typically takes 2–5 business days once you provide engagement details. We handle contracts, tax forms, and compliance checks for Belgium.

items.question: Can I convert a contractor to an employee later?
items.answer: Yes. If a contractor role becomes permanent, we can convert them to a full employee via our Belgium EOR service, with compliant Belgian employment contracts and benefits (ONSS/RSZ, holiday pay, 13th month).

items.question: Do you handle contractor payments and invoicing in Belgium?
items.answer: Yes. Our platform supports contractor invoicing and payments in EUR, with proper documentation for Belgian tax and social security compliance.

items.question: What is the joint committee (paritair comité) and does it affect contractors?
items.answer: The joint committee (paritair comité/commission paritaire) sets sector-specific rules for employees. Contractors are generally outside this scope, but misclassification can pull them in. We help you maintain clear contractor status and compliant agreements.
